package rulefixtures

// scenario for make_map_inside_hot_loop_same_shape: make(map[K]V, ...) scratch maps recreated inside loops instead of being reused or prebuilt.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule354PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario354Positive(records []Rule354PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
